lookalikes.prompt: A male-presenting individual, 50s-60s, with fair skin and subtle sun damage. His face is rectangular with a broader jawline and prominent cheekbones. Short, wavy, dark gray hair, slightly thinner than the original, with a subtle side part. Deep-set blue eyes are rounder, beneath lighter, well-groomed eyebrows. His nose is aquiline with a pointed tip. Lips are thin, pressed into a slight smile. A short, neatly trimmed gray stubble covers his jaw and chin. He is of European descent, looking directly at the viewer with a thoughtful expression, head tilted slightly to the left. He leans casually against a weathered brick wall in a quiet alley, wearing a plaid button-down shirt over a dark t-shirt. Three-quarter body shot, upper body in focus. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
